title: Sabse Bada Don
subTitle: An ambitious man dreams of becoming a crime lord. He joins hands with the mafia kingpin and gains his trust. He is soon assigned a task and upon its success depends the fate of his dream.

title: Poster Boys
subTitle: Three men face ridicule from their families and fellow villagers after they appear on a poster that promotes vasectomies. They soon embark on a mission to prove that they are victims of the system.

title: Extraaa Storiez

title: Naandhi
subTitle: Surya, an IT professional, is wrongly accused in a high-profile murder case and spends years enduring abuse and languishing in prison waiting for his trial.

title: Middle Class Melodies
subTitle: Raghava, a young man, runs a breakfast center in his village but wishes to open a small hotel in a nearby town. However, he faces challenges in his quest and must overcome them to succeed.

title: PK
subTitle: An innocent alien lands on Earth but loses his communication device. However, he meets Jaggu, a heartbroken reporter, and tries to find his device with her help.

title: Maari
subTitle: Maariyappan, a gangster, is confronted by Gangadhar Beeja, a rival. While he strives to defeat him, he attempts to cope with his son's questionable behaviour.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 2
subTitle: Rocky successfully rises as the leader and saviour of the people of the Kolar Gold Fields. But, in his goal to fulfil his mother's wishes, Rocky must tackle Adheera, Inayat Khalil and Ramika Sen.

title: Men in Black
subTitle: Agents K and J must stop an alien from getting his hands on the Galaxy, a powerful energy source, to stop an intergalactic war.

title: iSmart Shankar
subTitle: Shankar, an assassin, is on the run after murdering a politician. When a twist of fate gives him the memories of a slain police officer, he must help the authorities find a murderer.

title: Robinhood
subTitle: A modern-day Robin Hood thrives on stealing from the rich. However, he reluctantly becomes a bodyguard for a high-profile client due to unforeseen circumstances.

title: Action
subTitle: Subhash, an army man, seeks vengeance when a conspiracy claims his loved ones. He investigates the plot and takes matters into his own hands, mounting a daring operation to capture the culprit.

title: Love Story
subTitle: A Christian Zumba instructor falls for a starry-eyed upper caste Hindu girl. In their quest for happiness, they must first overcome a massive caste divide.

title: Atithi Devobhava
subTitle: A man suffers from monophobia, a condition that makes him dread being alone and want someone around him at all times. When he falls in love, his phobia causes problems in his relationship.

title: Godzilla
subTitle: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York city in order to feed and protect its brood.

title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 3
subTitle: Ruhaan, a fake ghost-chaser, takes a job at a spooky castle and finds out about a bad plan by tricky priests. His trip becomes a funny but scary ride with lots of surprises and frights.

title: The Mummy Returns
subTitle: An evil high priest wants a bracelet that Alex, an archaeologist couple's son, possesses.

title: Saiyaara
subTitle: Passionate lovers navigate a rollercoaster romance, facing euphoric highs and crushing lows while desperately clinging to their tumultuous bond.

title: Men in Black II
subTitle: Agent J is after a shapeshifting alien seeking a powerful but little-known object. To save the world, he must reunite with his former partner, Agent K.

title: Waltair Veerayya
subTitle: A desperate smuggler finds himself strapped for cash. Later, when an agent offers him a fortune to extradite a notorious drug lord from Malaysia, he accepts only to face a world of betrayal.

title: Mahavatar Narsimha
subTitle: Hiranyakashyap, a demon, challenges Vishnu, proclaiming himself a god. However, his son Prahlad remains devoted to Vishnu, who appears as Narsimha to defeat the demon.

title: Rama Rao on Duty
subTitle: A courageous and honest police officer investigates the case of the missing husband of his ex-girlfriend, which leads him to bust a scam pertaining to the illegal smuggling of red sandalwood.

title: Rama Rao on Duty
subTitle: A courageous and honest police officer investigates the case of the missing husband of his ex-girlfriend, which leads him to bust a scam pertaining to the illegal smuggling of red sandalwood.

title: Top Gear
subTitle: Arjun, a taxi driver, finds himself in trouble when one of his customers turns out to be a drug dealer. When the kingpin kidnaps Arjun's wife, he strives to save her.

title: Jabardast Jodi
subTitle: Two young men who fall in love with a woman in their neighbourhood, try several ways in order to attract and win her over.

title: Amigos
subTitle: Three identical men befriend each other through a doppelganger-finding application and things go well until the criminal past of one amongst them emerges.

title: Officer On Duty
subTitle: A demoted cop looks into fake jewelry criminals, getting caught up in a risky world of bad guys, putting his life in danger as he tries to solve the case.

title: Animal
subTitle: The hard-hearted son of a successful factory owner returns to his family after spending years in abroad and pledges to seek revenge on the people who pose a threat to his father's life.

title: Good Bad & Ugly
subTitle: A formidable crime lord strives for tranquility, abandoning his brutal history. Despite lingering shadows, he confronts his past with unwavering resolve.

title: Diljala Aashiq
subTitle: A happy-go-lucky radio jockey falls for a man in a very unusual way. However, they must overcome many obstacles, including their different perspectives on life, to be together.

title: A Aa
subTitle: Anasuya, the daughter of a rich and strict businesswoman, and Anand, a former chef from a middle-class family, fall in love. However, their background and family feud threatens their romance.

title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.

title: Eleven
subTitle: A seasoned police officer begins an investigation after a series of gruesome murders targeting twins comes to light. However, he soon encounters a sinister game of psychological manipulation.
